# dist/ — built awow plugin payload

This directory is the installable Claude Code plugin, built by `python tools/gather.py --surface plugin` from `.agents/` (plus `hooks/`, the legacy `commands/`, and a runtime slice of `tools/`). `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` points installers here so the maintainer workspace (`meta/`, `context/`, guides, tests) never ships to adopters.

Do not edit files in this directory — edit the source and re-run the gather. Any file here that the build did not plan is deleted on the next run.
